category_sources: Official Libxc manual describes it as a library of exchange-correlation functionals for density-functional theory.
source_facts.description says Libxc provides exchange and correlation functionals for codes.
display_name_sources: Official Libxc manual and project repository style the project name as Libxc.
docs_sources: Official Libxc site provides a dedicated manual at libxc.gitlab.io/manual.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://gitlab.com/libxc/libxc; per instruction repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: Official Libxc manual identifies the density-functional theory domain.
